rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
When AGREE reports '<error>' types, trace the first unresolved identifier on the same line and resolve it or remove the invalid clause.
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, only reference identifiers that are either AADL features or previously declared equation helpers within the same annex.
Validator diagnostics with '<error>' types often indicate unresolved references; resolve the root cause rather than adding new architecture elements.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and follow strict type checking for expressions.
Use only visible identifiers or declared helpers in guarantee expressions to avoid '<error>' type issues.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve the root cause of unresolved references.
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs. implementation annexes
